summary: Completed testing of TC Pro Dojo new category features: 1) Media 'category' field ('general' vs 'grid') - grid items correctly show on Training page's 12-photo grid, 2) classes_header_photo site setting shows above the class schedule calendar on Classes page, 3) AdminMedia form has category dropdown with Grid badge for grid items. All backend tests pass (12/13 - 1 cleanup test had issue with orphaned test data). Frontend features working correctly.

minor.issue: Orphaned test media items from iteration_1 had empty 'id' fields (fixed via MongoDB cleanup)

critical_code_review_comments: Training.js correctly filters by category='grid' instead of mediaType='photo' - verified working
Classes.js correctly displays classes_header_photo above calendar when setting exists - verified working
AdminMedia.js includes category dropdown with 'General' and 'Grid (Training Page)' options at data-testid='media-category-select' - verified working
AdminMedia.js shows purple 'Grid' badge for items with category='grid' - verified working
AdminSiteSettings.js includes classes_header_photo preset at data-testid='quick-add-classes_header_photo' - verified working
MediaModel backend has category field with default 'general' - verified working
All required data-testid attributes present for automated testing

success_rate.backend: 92% (12/13 tests passed - 1 cleanup test failed due to orphaned data)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up: 1 grid category test media item, 1 classes_header_photo site setting. Also cleaned up 5 orphaned test items from iteration_1.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features verified: 1) MediaModel has 'category' field ('general' default, 'grid' for Training page). Only 'grid' items show in Training page's 12-photo grid. 2) classes_header_photo site setting shows a photo above the calendar on /classes page when created. 3) AdminMedia form has Category dropdown and purple Grid badge visible on grid items. All data-testid attributes working correctly.

media_category_field.backend_model: MediaModel has category field with default='general' - verified at line ~280 in server.py
media_category_field.api_response: /api/media returns category field for all items
media_category_field.admin_ui: AdminMedia form has category dropdown with 'General' and 'Grid (Training Page)' options
media_category_field.grid_badge: Purple 'Grid' badge shows on items with category='grid'

training_page_grid.filter_logic: Training.js filters by category='grid' not mediaType='photo'
training_page_grid.12_photo_limit: Frontend uses .slice(0, 12) to limit grid items
training_page_grid.empty_state: Grid section not rendered when no grid items exist

classes_header_photo.site_setting: classes_header_photo preset available in AdminSiteSettings Quick Add section
classes_header_photo.frontend_display: Classes.js shows photo above calendar when setting exists with data-testid='classes-header-photo'
classes_header_photo.empty_state: No error when setting doesn't exist - section not rendered
